# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: projects/dm/global

resources:
- name: my-app
  type: projects/dm/global/app
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    displayName: My App
    description: A complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer)
    services:
    - service: compute
      version: V1
      resources:
      - name: my-vm
        type: compute.v1.instance
        properties:
          zone: us-central1-a
          machineType: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/my-project/zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/n1-standard-1
          disks:
          - deviceName: boot
            type: PERSISTENT
            boot: true
            autoDelete: true
            initializeParams:
              sourceImage: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-9
          networkInterfaces:
          - network: https://www.googleapis.<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>ompute/v1/projects/my-project/global/networks/default
            accessConfigs:
            - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    - service: sqladmin
      version: v1beta4
      resources:
      - name: my-db
        type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
        properties:
          databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
          settings:
            tier: db-f1-micro
            ipConfiguration:
              ipv4Enabled: true
    - service: storage
      version: v1
      resources:
      - name: my-bucket
        type: storage.v1.bucket
        properties:
          location: US
          storageClass: STANDARD
    - service: compute
      version: V1
      resources:
      - name: my-lb
        type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
        properties:
          baseInstanceName: my-vm
          targetPools:
          - https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/my-project/regions/us-central1/targetPools/default-pool
